strengths: 15+ years full-stack engineering with consistent senior/staff roles showing technical progression
Deep distributed-systems expertise: Dunnhumby (millions req/sec microservices), event-driven GISCollective on Kubernetes
Current focus at re:cinq on agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly targets role domain
concerns: Multi-agent AI production experience unverified: agentic work is only 2 months old with no prior roles demonstrating production multi-agent systems
Fintech infrastructure completely absent: no credit systems, trading, risk modeling, compliance, or regulated-finance experience across entire career
Team leadership and executive scope unclear: resume reads as senior technical contributor without evidence of scaling 10-30+ person teams or C-suite strategic presence

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and real-time architecture expertise

response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of solid engineering with genuine strength in distributed systems and real-time architecture at scale. However, the CTO role has two stated hard requirements—production multi-agent AI systems and fintech infrastructure—where his resume shows minimal evidence. His current agentic AI work at re:cinq is promising but only 2 months in with unclear scope. No background exists in credit systems, trading, risk modeling, or regulated finance across his entire career. His technical foundation is strong, but domain depth and demonstrated agentic-systems experience appear insufficient for immediate executive effectiveness in this role.
